name: Allen & Company
description: Professional surveyors and mappers providing land, aerial, and hydrographic surveying solutions across Central Florida, with nearly 40 years supporting homebuilders and developers.[8]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Working with Allen & Company has been a blessing.
the perfect strategic partner for our commercial development projects
Their insight and advice is invaluable when it comes to our projects
It's their know-how that makes a difference when compared to the rest

sentiment.summary: Allen & Company receives overwhelmingly positive testimonials from diverse clients praising their expertise, strategic partnership, and instrumental role in project success across construction, commercial real estate, and healthcare sectors.

name: First Choice Surveying, Inc.
description: Offers premium land surveying services for residential and commercial needs in Florida, using latest technology for fast turnaround, including aerial photography.[4]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: The survey that you turned around same day yesterday was nothing shy of a miracle
I've been in this crazy business for 48 years and your company by far is the best I have ever worked with
You notify us very promptly if you can expedite and if there will be additional fees—THIS IS HUGE AND UNLIKE OTHER VENDORS
The smoothest I've ever encountered; 10/10 recommend

sentiment.summary: First Choice Surveying, Inc. receives overwhelmingly positive reviews with customers consistently praising their exceptional service quality, rapid turnaround times, reliability, and superior communication compared to competitors.

name: GeoPoint Surveying
description: Specializes in Florida land surveying using leading-edge remote sensing LiDAR surveys and subsurface utility locating.[6]

name: Millman National Land Services
description: Provides comprehensive ALTA Land Surveying and Zoning services, including ALTA/NSPS Surveying, Boundary Surveys, and Drone Land Surveying across Florida, from urban centers to rural areas.[1]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: They're friendly, with a can-do, will-do attitude. They're always trying to make sure we're a satisfied customer.
There is no confusion. They're available and enthusiastic about the work they do. That is peace of mind for us.
We were thoroughly impressed with Millman during the Burger King transaction and will be sure to keep Millman in mind for future transactions.

sentiment.summary: Millman National Land Services has an exceptionally positive reputation, with clients consistently praising their friendly demeanor, enthusiasm, direct service delivery, and customer-focused approach across multiple major transactions.

name: NexGen Surveying
description: Provides top-notch land surveying services statewide in Florida with over 40 years of experience, focusing on quality, competitive rates, and meeting deadlines.[5]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Almost immediate responses to our email requests and questions. Their crews show up on time and the final Survey is always prompt
John gave me a quote within 1 hour and finished the survey in 3 day WOW! Such nice people so easy to work with
In today's busy environment, it is difficult to find a surveyor that will respond timely. With NexGen, we were extremely happy
They are always willing to go the extra mile and are extremely professional. Their Account Representative, Mike is a huge asset

sentiment.summary: NexGen Surveying receives overwhelmingly positive reviews, with customers consistently praising their rapid response times, professional staff, competitive pricing, and exceptional service quality.

name: Real Res
description: Offers property line surveys, boundary surveys, topographic surveys, elevation certificates, and ALTA/NSPS land title surveys across Florida.[7]

name: Southeastern Surveying and Mapping Company (SSMC)
description: Full-service land surveying and mapping for projects throughout Florida, including boundary surveys, topographic surveys, subdivision platting, and route surveys.[3]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: set the Live Structural Steel Surveying performance bar to a new pinnacle
task was completed one day ahead of schedule with no underground utilities damaged
has been nothing but a pleasure to work with
went above and beyond our expectations

sentiment.summary: SSMC has an exceptionally strong reputation with unanimous positive feedback from major clients praising their professionalism, reliability, efficiency, and ability to exceed project expectations.
